text:
Excited to unveil OrderFlow AI -- an open-source, multi-agent Order-to-Cash orchestration engine we built at AgentsFactory.

Enterprises lose millions to order mismatches, delayed invoices, and cross-system data drift. OrderFlow AI uses 7 specialized LangGraph agents to automate the entire O2C pipeline: order intake, inventory checking, ERP syncing, fulfillment tracking, invoicing, reconciliation, and exception handling.

Built with Python/FastAPI, React/TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Docker. Every component is fully open source and ready to deploy.

Check it out on GitHub: https://github.com/phanindraintelligenzit-afk/orderflow-ai
